data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a 'Central management view', which is explicitly stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or data that demonstrate the existence or functionality of such a view. The absence of evidence confirming this requirement indicates a gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence of a central management view being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
